pillars.title: Code as Constitution
pillars.summary: Governance logic expressed in executable, verifiable protocols.

pillars.title: Networked Citizenship
pillars.summary: Identity, rights, and participation portable across digital and physical borders.

pillars.title: Prosperity Through Openness
pillars.summary: Shared innovation, transparent markets, and composable public goods.

pillars.title: Planetary Stewardship
pillars.summary: Ecological limits encoded in resource accounting and allocation protocols.
